transcript:
Agent: Good afternoon, thank you for calling First Bank customer service. How can I help you today?
Customer: Hi, I'm calling because I see a charge on my account that I don't recognize. It's for $50 and it shows as 'Unknown Merchant'.
Agent: I'm sorry to hear that. Let me help you with that right away. Can I get your account number?
Customer: Sure, it's 4521-8854-9876-3210.
Agent: Thank you. I'm pulling up your account now. Yes, I can see the charge from this morning at 10:15 AM. This looks like it could be fraudulent activity. I understand how concerning that must be.
Customer: Yes, this is really frustrating. I never made this purchase and I don't recognize the merchant at all.
Agent: I completely understand your frustration. We take fraud very seriously. Let me take immediate action. I'm going to block this charge and issue a dispute right now.
Customer: Okay, thank you. How long will this take?
Agent: The dispute process typically takes 5-7 business days. I'll also be issuing you a new debit card as a precaution. It will arrive within 3-5 business days. In the meantime, the $50 will be credited back to your account as a provisional credit within 24 hours.
Customer: That sounds good. And what about my other transactions? Are they safe?
Agent: Great question. I've reviewed your recent activity and everything else looks legitimate. However, I recommend you monitor your account for the next 30 days. You can also call us immediately if you see anything unusual.
Customer: Will you recommend that I change my password too?
Agent: Absolutely, that's a great idea. Even though we don't see evidence of full account compromise, changing your password is an excellent precaution. I'd recommend making it strong and unique.
Customer: Alright, I'll do that today. Thank you for your help. This was much faster than I expected.
Agent: You're very welcome! We're here to protect your account. You should receive a confirmation email within the hour about the dispute. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
Customer: No, that's everything. Thanks again!
Agent: Thank you for choosing First Bank, and we appreciate your business. Have a great day!
